*Wenbo Wei,Jun Wang,Shan Raza,Abhir Bhalerao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PEMOLA模块，通过遮挡级别注意力与位置嵌入调制，增强Transformer全景分割中的遮挡建模能力，在COCO-OLAC和Cityscapes-OLAC数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂场景中的全景分割因遮挡问题而具有挑战性，现有方法往往忽略遮挡建模。

Method: 提出PEMOLA模块：训练遮挡分类器获得遮挡级别注意力作为空间引导，将遮挡标签编码为可学习嵌入产生通道权重，通过联合调制将遮挡先验引入位置嵌入，从而增强遮挡建模。

Result: 在COCO-OLAC和Cityscapes-OLAC数据集上，PEMOLA一致提升了全景分割质量，且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: 遮挡建模在全景分割中至关重要，引入遮挡级别注意力有助于实现鲁棒的全景分割。

Abstract: Panoptic segmentation in complex scenes remains challenging because of occlusions, yet modern approaches often neglect occlusion modelling. In this paper, we propose \textbf{P}osition \textbf{E}mbedding \textbf{M}odulation with \textbf{O}cclusion-\textbf{L}evel \textbf{A}ttention (PEMOLA), a novel occlusion-aware module that can be seamlessly integrated into transformer-based panoptic segmentation. To obtain occlusion cues, we train an occlusion classifier on the COCO-OLAC dataset. The classifier derives the occlusion-level attention, which serves as spatial guidance, while the occlusion labels are encoded into a learnable embedding to produce channel-wise weights. Through joint modulation, PEMOLA elegantly introduces the occlusion priors into the position embedding, thereby improving the occlusion modelling. We further annotate the Cityscapes dataset with occlusion levels, termed Cityscapes Occlusion Labels for All Computer Vision Tasks (Cityscapes-OLAC), following the same labelling protocol as COCO-OLAC, to evaluate the cross-dataset generalisation ability of PEMOLA. Extensive experiments on COCO-OLAC and Cityscapes-OLAC demonstrate that PEMOLA consistently improves panoptic segmentation quality while introducing minimal computational overhead. These results highlight the importance of occlusion modelling, where incorporating occlusion-level attention helps deliver robust panoptic segmentation under occlusion. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/wenbo-wei/PEMOLA.

</details>


### [182] [O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18142)
*Mei Yuan,Qi Long,Qifeng Wu,Zhenyang Li,Yizhou Zhao,Lei Wang,Yang Liu,Min Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需训练的智能体框架，通过跟踪物体时空状态演化轨迹来检测工业视频中的异常，在三个数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM异常推理方法在通用领域表现良好，但在工业场景中因复杂的物体变换、严格的物理和过程约束而性能下降。需要一种无需领域知识、无需重新训练的方法来应对工业交互密集型异常检测。

Method: 提出一种无需训练的智能体框架，模拟人类检验员的思维方式，跟踪检测对象随时间变化的时空动态和底层变换，基于物体级时间状态轨迹进行推理，识别异常对象并定位到帧。

Result: 在三个IVAD数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法优于前沿VLM、智能体框架以及在各自数据集上微调的传统VAD方法，并能提供异常过程和类型的可解释报告。

Conclusion: 该训练无关的智能体框架有效克服了工业异常检测中需重新训练或注入领域知识的局限，通过物体状态演化追踪实现了更优的检测性能和可解释性。

Abstract: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection (IVAD) aims to identify anomalous objects and events in an industrial process, which is crucial for modern manufacturing and quality control systems. Existing VLM-based anomaly reasoning methods are capable of detecting open-ended anomalies in general domains. However, their performance declines in industrial settings characterized by intricate object transformations, strict physics, and procedural constraints. To tackle the complexity of such interaction-intensive detection, we introduce a training-free agentic framework for anomaly detection free of domain-specific knowledge, emphasizing object state evolution like humans inspectors. It is designed to track spatial-temporal dynamics and underlying transformations of detected objects over time, and then reason over the object-wise temporal state trajectories to identify abnormal objects in grounded frames. Our method overcomes limitations of prior approaches that rely on retraining on normal clips or injecting domain knowledge as context for test-time inference. Extensive experiments on three IVAD datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms frontier VLMs, agentic frameworks, and traditional VAD methods fine-tuned on the respective datasets, while providing interpretable reports over anomaly processes and types.

</details>


### [183] [Lossless-INR: Lossless Volumetric Implicit Neural Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18150)
*Kaiyuan Tang,Daniel Burke,Chaoli Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Lossless-INR，一种基于位平面分解的无损隐式神经表示框架，用于3D科学体积数据。通过将体素值分解为二进制位平面，将重建转化为逐位二分类问题，结合八叉树块划分和三元特征网格网络，实现了比特精确的重建和零误码率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于隐式神经表示（INR）的体积数据方法本质上是有损的，即使很小的重建误差也会在渲染和下游分析中传播，影响结果可靠性。

Method: 1. 位平面分解：将每个体素值分解为二进制位平面，将重建问题转化为逐位二分类任务；2. 八叉树块划分：自适应细分复杂区域，使优化更易处理；3. 三元特征网格网络：用三元值集合参数化网格条目，保持表示紧凑性。

Result: 在多种体积数据集上实现了零误码率和比特精确重建，支持保真渲染和下游分析，且表示紧凑。

Conclusion: Lossless-INR成功将INR框架扩展至无损重建领域，验证了位平面分解结合八叉树和三元特征网格在科学体积数据无损压缩与表示中的有效性。

Abstract: Implicit neural representation (INR) methods provide continuous coordinate-to-value mappings and integrate naturally with direct volume rendering, making them attractive for representing volumetric data. However, existing INR-based approaches for volumetric data are inherently lossy, and even small reconstruction errors can propagate through rendering and downstream analysis. In this work, we explore Lossless-INR, a lossless INR framework for 3D scientific volumetric data based on bit-plane decomposition. By decomposing each voxel value into binary bit-planes, we reformulate reconstruction as per-bit binary classification, so that exact recovery reduces to predicting every bit correctly. To make this optimization tractable while keeping the representation compact, we combine an octree block-partitioning strategy that adaptively subdivides complex regions with a ternary feature-grid network whose grid entries are parameterized by a ternary set of values. Experiments on diverse volumetric datasets show that this design can achieve zero bit-error rate and bit-exact reconstruction, enabling faithful rendering and downstream analysis with a compact representation. The code is available at https://github.com/TouKaienn/Lossless-INR.

</details>


### [184] [Plenoptic Condensation: A Novel Approach to Generalized Scene Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18151)
*Brevin Tilmon,Alex DeJournett,John Leffingwell,Scott Ackerson*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Plenoptic Condensation (PCon)的新型通用场景重建方法，通过多阶段重建流水线，将图像先转换为低表达能力"汤状"场景元素，再自适应浓缩为高表达能力"结构化"元素，能够高效表示锐利边缘和光滑反射面。PCon的重建模型（Reality Models, Relms）具有空间可变的表示能力，在消费级手机和无人机拍摄的真实场景中表现优异。在"受损菲亚特"案例中，PCon的重建精度是SOTA方法的两倍以上，局部损伤剖面误差仅35微米，而其他方法几乎无法测量损伤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用场景重建方法在表示锐利边缘和光滑反射面等复杂细节时能力有限，且缺乏空间可变的表示能力，难以同时兼顾高保真渲染、精确测量和场景理解的需求。

Method: 提出多阶段重建流水线：首先将图像转换为低表示能力的"汤状"场景元素，然后通过自适应浓缩过程，将这些元素聚合为高表示能力的"结构化"元素，形成具有空间可变表示能力的Reality Models (Relms)。

Result: 在"受损菲亚特"案例中，PCon对汽车引擎盖的重建精度是NeRO和RT-Splatting等SOTA方法的两倍以上；局部损伤剖面误差为35微米（0.035 mm），而其他两种SOTA方法基本无法测量损伤。

Conclusion: PCon通过自适应浓缩策略和空间可变表示能力，在真实场景重建中实现了远超现有SOTA方法的精度，尤其在微小损伤测量等精细任务中展现出独特优势。

Abstract: We present a novel Generalized Scene Reconstruction (GSR) approach called Plenoptic Condensation (PCon). PCon uses a multi-stage reconstruction pipeline, initially converting images into "soupy" scene elements with low (representational) power, then adaptively condensing the "soup" into "structured" elements of higher power capable of efficiently representing, for example, sharp edges and smooth reflective surfaces. PCon scene models called Reality Models (Relms) enable spatially varying representational power, which is essential for high-fidelity rendering, measurement, and scene understanding. We showcase several in-the-wild PCon reconstructions captured with consumer phone cameras and drones. In one case called "Damaged Fiat", PCon is benchmarked against two state-of-the-art (SOTA) GSR methods: NeRO and RT-Splatting. Referring to Figure 1 below, PCon reconstructs the car hood more than twice as accurately as the SOTA methods. But more importantly, the local damage profile error for PCon is 35 um (0.035 mm), whereas the two other SOTA methods are essentially unable to measure the damage at all. Our project website is available at https://quidient.github.io/pcon-2026.html.

</details>


### [185] [Robust Multimodal Dynamic Object Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18153)
*Zhe Xin,Hanzhi Chang,Penghui Huang,Yinian Mao,Guoquan Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合2D点轨迹、3D重建和语义信息的多模态动态物体分割框架，结合Transformer与特征聚类聚合模块，并引入基于点查询的SAM后处理方法，在动态分割和静态场景重建任务上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有光流法难以保证动态/静态分割在物体边界处的一致性，而基于3D重建的方法对重建误差高度敏感，亟需一种更鲁棒、精确的动态物体分割方法。

Method: 设计了一个结合Transformer架构与特征聚类聚合模块的网络，对多模态特征轨迹进行静态/动态分类；模型可自适应决定每个场景中哪种特征占主导，并缓解特征退化问题；同时提出基于点查询的SAM后处理方法以处理单掩码中的多物体。

Result: 在动态物体分割和静态场景重建任务上均取得了最先进的性能（state-of-the-art）。

Conclusion: 融合多模态线索（2D点轨迹、3D重建、语义信息）并配合自适应特征选择机制，能有效克服单一模态的局限性，实现更精确完整的动态物体分割。

Abstract: Dynamic object segmentation plays a critical role in many visual applications such as static scene reconstruction from dynamic videos. However, existing optical flow-based methods fail to ensure consistent static/dynamic segmentation along object boundaries, while 3D reconstruction-based approaches are highly sensitive to reconstruction errors. To address these limitations, we present a dynamic object segmentation framework that can generate both precise and complete dynamic masks by integrating multimodal cues including 2D point tracks, 3D reconstruction, and semantic information. We design a network combining Transformer architectures with feature clustering aggregation modules to perform static/dynamic classification of multimodal feature trajectories. It enables the model to adaptively determine which type of feature should dominate based on the characteristics of each scene, while also mitigating the impact of feature degradation. Additionally, we introduce a novel point-query-based SAM post-processing method capable of handling multiple objects within a single mask. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in both dynamic object segmentation and static scene reconstruction tasks.

</details>


### [186] [Certified Training for Convolutional Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18195)
*Benedikt Brückner,Alessio Lomuscio*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的认证训练方法，通过对卷积扰动进行高效编码，训练出可证明鲁棒的视觉模型，在抵抗运动模糊等扰动方面显著优于对抗训练，在CIFAR10上实现了超过80%的鲁棒准确率，同时保持标准准确率不降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉模型容易受到运行时运动模糊等扰动的影响，导致关键应用中出现故障。现有方法（如数据增强、对抗训练）虽能提升经验鲁棒性，但缺乏形式化的安全保障，难以识别和缓解隐藏的漏洞。

Method: 提出一种新的认证训练方法，利用对卷积扰动的高效编码来训练可证明鲁棒的模型。

Result: 该方法在CIFAR10数据集上，针对合理强度的运动模糊扰动，实现了超过80%的鲁棒准确率，显著优于对抗训练，同时保持了相当的标准准确率。

Conclusion: 所提出的认证训练方法能够有效提升模型对运动模糊等卷积扰动的鲁棒性，并提供了形式化的安全保障，在鲁棒性和标准性能之间取得了良好的平衡。

Abstract: Vision models have been found to be susceptible to perturbations such as motion blur induced at runtime by a shaking camera. This impedes their deployment in critical applications since phenomena such as slightly blurred vision might lead to failures, for example an object detector missing objects. While methods such as data augmentation or Adversarial Training can improve empirical robustness, they lack formal safety guarantees, making it difficult to identify and mitigate hidden vulnerabilities. We introduce a novel Certified Training approach that leverages an efficient encoding of convolutional perturbations to train provably robust models. Our method significantly outperforms Adversarial Training, achieving, for example, over 80% robust accuracy against motion blur of reasonable intensity on CIFAR10 while maintaining comparable standard accuracy.

</details>


### [187] [HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18217)
*Yiyang Cai,Nan Chen,Rongchang Xie,Junwen Pan,Chunyang Jiang,Cheng Chen,Wen Zhou,Zhenbang Sun,Wei Xue,Wenhan Luo,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HOMIE框架，统一解决人-物中心视频个性化中的主体间和主体内参考输入问题，通过多模态大模型集成策略和全局多模态引导，在保持高主体保真度的同时实现准确的人-物交互，达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在主体保真度与交互模式准确性之间难以平衡，且缺乏处理主体内参考输入（如OCR图、多视图输入）的机制。

Method: 提出HOMIE框架，包含：1) 更好的MLLM集成策略，在不牺牲文本编码器可控性前提下提取参考级关系知识；2) 自注意力中的全局多模态引导，对齐MLLM语义特征与VAE令牌；3) 模态参考嵌入，区分MLLM特征和VAE令牌并关联主体内参考图像令牌。

Result: 在多种人-物中心视频个性化任务上达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: HOMIE通过统一框架有效解决了主体间和主体内参考问题，为HOCVP任务提供了更优的方案。

Abstract: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. First, most approaches focusing on inter-subject personalization still struggle to strike a balance between high subject fidelity and accurate interaction patterns between humans and diverse objects, especially when objects represent abstract concepts such as logos. Second, while intra-subject references (e.g., OCR maps, multi-view inputs) are expected to enhance subject fidelity, most existing works lack mechanisms to understand such latent correspondence. To address both challenges, we propose HOMIE, an HOCVP framework that tackles both inter- and intra-subject input settings in a unified manner. Compared to previous approaches, HOMIE proposes a better MLLM integration strategy to extract knowledge of reference-level relationships without compromising the controllability of text encoders or incurring costly re-alignment. Specifically, we introduce global multimodal guidance within self-attention to better align MLLM-derived semantic features with VAE tokens. Furthermore, we propose modality-reference embedding to differentiate tokens from MLLM features and VAE tokens and associate intra-subject reference image tokens. Extensive experiments validate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across various HOCVP tasks. Project Page: https://yiyangcai.github.io/homie-page.github.io/

</details>


### [188] [GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18218)
*Naoto Usuyama,Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Sicong Yao,Hanwen Xu,Jaspreet Bagga,Guanghui Qin,Robert E. Kramer,Cliff Wong,Soohee Lee,Hao Qiu,Theodore Zhengde Zhao,Racheli Ben Shimol,Angela Crabtree,Kevin Matlock,Eduardo Alejandro Lozano Garcia,Naiteek Sangani,Alberto Santamaria-Pang,Jason Entenmann,Alexandra Q. Bartlett,Bill J. Wright,Bernard A. Fox,Brian Piening,Sheng Zhang,Sheng Wang,Tristan Naumann,Carlo Bifulco,Hoifung Poon*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了GigaPath-Flash和GigaTIME-Flash，两个高效的全切片病理学AI和空间蛋白组学预测模型。GigaPath-Flash通过知识蒸馏将十亿参数的ViT-g教师模型压缩为2200万参数的ViT-S瓦片编码器，仅用2%的计算成本就保留了97%的切片级性能。GigaTIME-Flash基于该骨干网络，从H&E图像直接预测肿瘤免疫微环境，速度提升6倍、GPU内存减少8倍。这些模型与GigaPath和GigaTIME共同构成Apache-2.0开源权重的病理学基础模型家族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有病理学基础模型大多仅在图像瓦片级别运行、使用限制性许可且计算成本高昂，限制了大规模临床和研究应用。本文旨在开发高效、开源的全切片病理学AI模型。

Method: 采用知识蒸馏将十亿参数的GigaPath (ViT-g) 教师模型压缩为2200万参数的ViT-S瓦片编码器，与2100万参数的LongNet切片编码器结合形成GigaPath-Flash；GigaTIME-Flash在此基础上扩展用于肿瘤免疫微环境预测。

Result: GigaPath-Flash以50倍计算量缩减保留97%的切片级性能；GigaTIME-Flash超越原CNN版GigaTIME，速度提升6倍，GPU内存减少8倍。

Conclusion: 通过Apache-2.0开源发布，为计算病理学、免疫肿瘤学和精准健康提供可访问的基础模块。

Abstract: Foundation models have emerged as a driving force in computational pathology, with the potential to transform cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection by learning transferable representations from large-scale histopathology data. A growing landscape of pathology foundation models now spans diverse data sources, architectures, and downstream applications. However, most pretrained models operate only at the image-tile level, use restrictive licenses, and remain computationally expensive, limiting large-scale slide-level clinical and research use.
  Here, we introduce GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash, efficient models for whole-slide pathology AI and spatial proteomics prediction. GigaPath-Flash combines a 22M-parameter ViT-S tile encoder with a 21M-parameter LongNet slide encoder, both pretrained on large-scale real-world histopathology data. Its compact tile encoder is distilled from the billion-parameter GigaPath (ViT-g) teacher and shared by both models. GigaPath-Flash retains 97% of GigaPath's average slide-level performance with 50x less compute. GigaTIME-Flash extends this backbone to predict the tumor immune microenvironment directly from routine H&E images. It surpasses the original CNN-based GigaTIME in prediction quality while running 6x faster and using 8x less GPU memory.
  Together with GigaPath and GigaTIME, these models form an open-weight, Apache-2.0-licensed family pretrained on large-scale real-world clinical data. By releasing all models and weights, we provide accessible building blocks for computational pathology, immuno-oncology, and precision health.

</details>


### [189] [FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18227)
*Dingyun Zhang,Lixue Gong,Wei Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种统一视频与图像生成编辑的模型，通过像素对时域卷曲折叠流场直接从图像编辑样本实时生成视频编辑样本，并设计模态模仿损失来对齐两种模态的能力分布，同时引入感知相关任务（如指代分割）及编辑区域感知的潜在级和注意力级损失，使模型内化语言指导下的视觉编辑能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频编辑数据收集依赖耗时且易错的流程（对象掩码标注、I2V模型合成、VLM质量过滤），编辑任务多样性远低于图像编辑模型；同时现有方法依赖外部辅助（微调MLLM或显式提供掩码序列），缺乏模型内化编辑能力的方式。

Method: (1) 构建像素对时域卷曲折叠流场，从图像编辑样本实时生成视频编辑样本；(2) 设计模态模仿生成损失和编辑损失，通过对齐输出分布来相对对齐两种模态能力；(3) 引入感知相关任务（指代表达分割），配合编辑区域感知的潜在级损失和注意力级损失，使模型内化区域定位与编辑能力。

Result: 在多个视频编辑任务层面证明，仅使用该方法生成的数据，模型即可学习视频编辑，且实现了图像与视频模态能力的有效对齐。

Conclusion: 将图像视为视频的特殊形式，通过数据流、模态对齐和感知级损失的设计，实现了统一模型内图像与视频的生成编辑能力，并让模型内化了语言引导的编辑区域定位能力，无需外部辅助模块。

Abstract: In line with the prevailing direction of vision research, we explore the integration of both generation and editing capabilities for video and image modalities within a single model. Current approaches to collecting video editing data typically depend on labour-intensive, time-consuming curated procedures--involving object mask annotation, the use of error-introducing pair synthesis via I2V model and ControlNet-like guidance, and VLM-based quality filtering or refinement--and demonstrate limited task scalability. As a result, the diversity of editing tasks remains substantially narrower than that available for image editing models. We develop a pixel-pair temporal warped flow field that can directly generate corresponding video editing samples in real time from image editing samples, and we demonstrate across multiple levels of video editing tasks that a model can learn video editing using only such data. We regard the image modality as a particular form of the video modality. Accordingly, we design a modality mimic generation loss and a modality mimic editing loss to relatively align the capabilities--and thereby the output distributions--of the two modalities through mutual imitation. Moreover, language-based visual editing entails the comprehension of the editing instruction and the reference visual content, the localization of the region corresponding to that instruction within the reference visual contents, and the modification of that region alone. Existing approaches predominantly rely on external aids, such as fine-tuning an additional MLLM or explicitly supplying a mask sequence as auxiliary input during inference. In contrast, we aspire for the model to internalize this capability. To that end, we introduce sense-related tasks--for instance, referring expression segmentation--along with corresponding editing-region-aware latent-level loss and attention-level loss.

</details>


### [190] [Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18230)
*Yi Tang,Xinyi Shang,Jiacheng Cui,Sondos Mahmoud Bsharat,Jiacheng Liu,Xiaohan Zhao,Tran Dinh Tien,Ahmed Elhagry,Salwa K. Al Khatib,Tianjun Yao,Yonina C. Eldar,Jing-Hao Xue,Hao Li,Salman Khan,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向现代视觉语言模型（如ChatGPT、Gemini等）生成的图像篡改检测的域泛化训练框架，通过平衡小批量采样和延迟注入策略，在跨模型和分布外场景下显著提升了像素级篡改定位性能，相比先前SOTA方法PIXAR在gIoU和cIoU上分别提升26.1%和26.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代VLM（如ChatGPT、Gemini等）生成的图像在像素级篡改检测中面临跨模型和分布外迁移的挑战，现有方法在不同VLM生成分布下的鲁棒性不足。

Method: 提出两个核心策略：1）平衡小批量采样，在每个小批量中均衡采样篡改图像与真实图像，防止偏置优化；2）延迟注入策略，先在大量基础数据上训练检测器至稳定收敛，再引入少量新兴VLM分布的支撑数据微调，避免过拟合。

Result: 在GPT-Images-2.0、Gemini-3.1、FLUX.2、Seedream 4.5等OOD VLM上，相比PIXAR在平均gIoU和cIoU上分别实现26.1%和26.8%的相对提升。

Conclusion: 该框架虽概念简单，但为像素级篡改定位和OOD鲁棒性提供了强有效的解决方案，代码已开源。

Abstract: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cross-model and out-of-distribution shifts. This work studies domain generalization for pixel-level image tampering detection in modern VLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen-Image, etc., aiming to learn tampering localization models that remain robust across diverse VLM-generated manipulation distributions. We propose a simple yet effective domain-generalized training framework built on two practical strategies. First, we introduce a balanced minibatch sampling scheme that strategically samples tampered and real images in each minibatch, preventing biased optimization toward either manipulated artifacts or clean-image priors and avoiding training collapse, ensuring that each optimization step receives proper sampled gradient signals. Second, we adopt a simple late-injection strategy, where the detector is first trained on large-scale base data until stable convergence, and then exposed to a small amount of newly selected supporting data from emerging VLM distributions, improving adaptability without overfitting to limited new domains. Together, these components provide a simple yet strong recipe for improving pixel-level tampering localization and OOD robustness across modern VLMs. Despite the conceptual simplicity, our framework outperforms the prior state-of-the-art PIXAR by a large margin of 26.1% and 26.8% relative improvement in average gIoU and cIoU, respectively, across OOD VLMs of GPT-Images-2.0, Gemini-3.1, FLUX.2, and Seedream 4.5. Our code is available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/PIXAR-DG

</details>


### [191] [The Many Senses of Visual Similarity: A Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18237)
*Sheng-Yu Wang,Yotam Nitzan,Aaron Hertzmann,Jun-Yan Zhu,Eli Shechtman,Alexei A. Efros,Richard Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了TPIPS，一种基于文本提示的视觉相似性度量方法，通过大规模三元组数据集和微调视觉语言模型，支持根据文本条件判断图像相似性，在多个任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的感知相似性度量将多方面的相似性（如形状、颜色）压缩为单一标量，无法根据特定方面进行条件化判断，缺乏细粒度的控制能力。

Method: 构建大规模图像三元组数据集，每个三元组包含多维度自由语义相似性标注；微调视觉语言模型，使其能够根据文本提示输出条件化的感知相似性分数（TPIPS）。

Result: TPIPS与人类感知一致性更高，能泛化到训练分布之外的数据；在文本引导检索、组合搜索和生成模型细粒度评估中表现优异。

Conclusion: TPIPS通过文本条件化解决了现有感知度量缺乏语义可调节性的问题，为视觉相似性判断提供了更灵活、更符合人类认知的解决方案。

Abstract: Human visual similarity judgments are context-dependent. For example, two images may be similar in shape but distinct in color. Existing perceptual similarity metrics, however, collapse these nuances into a single scalar value, offering no mechanism to condition on specific aspects. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset of human similarity judgments over image triplets, where each triplet is annotated across multiple, free-form semantic aspects of similarity. Benchmarking a broad range of frontier vision-language models (VLMs) reveals a considerable performance gap compared to human annotators' consensus. Leveraging our data, we fine-tune a VLM to produce our Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Similarity (TPIPS) metric, capturing multiple senses of visual similarity depending on the specified text prompt. We demonstrate that TPIPS aligns more closely with human perception and generalizes reliably beyond the training distribution. Finally, we show that TPIPS unlocks new capabilities in text-guided retrieval, compositional search, and the fine-grained evaluation of generative models. Our code, data, and trained models are at https://peterwang512.github.io/TPIPS

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [192] [EII-SCL: Harnessing Emotional Inertia for Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17366)
*Zilong Huang,Kong Aik Lee,Chong-Xin Gan,Zezhong Jin,Ruichen Zuo,Man-Wai Mak*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出情绪惯性引导的监督对比学习模块（EII-SCL），通过在时间窗口内构建受惯性影响的样本，利用情绪惯性作为先验知识，有效提升多模态对话情绪识别的性能，在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态对话情绪识别方法虽能建模复杂的上下文依赖关系，但忽视了情绪转变中上下文情绪惯性的影响，导致性能欠佳。

Method: 提出情绪惯性引导的监督对比学习模块（EII-SCL），在时间窗口内构建受惯性影响的样本，将情绪惯性作为先验信息融入对比学习目标，无需额外数据即可与现有MERC模型无缝集成。

Result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法持续优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过引入情绪惯性先验，EII-SCL有效提升了多模态对话情绪识别的准确性，且具有良好的通用性和可集成性。

Abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition in conversation (MERC) achieves accurate predictions by integrating multimodal and contextual information in dialogues. While current MERC approaches focus on modeling complex contextual dependencies in conversation, they often overlook the impact of contextual emotional inertia in emotion shift, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel Emotional Inertia-Informed Supervised Contrastive Learning module (EII-SCL) that informs the contrastive objective by constructing inertia-affected samples within temporal windows, effectively leveraging emotional inertia as a prior while enabling seamless integration with existing MERC models without requiring additional data. Extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD show that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [193] [GEAR: Reconstruction of Classical Paintings via Geometry Grounding and Appearance Restitution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17519)
*Qinyu Zhang,Xinda Liu,Yunchen Li,Yunzhuo Liu,Chenxi Hu,Kang Li,Guohua Geng*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出CP3D任务（从单幅古典绘画重建3D场景）及GeAR方法（两阶段无训练框架：几何接地+外观复原），并构建HeriArch基准数据集，实验证明该方法在几何合理性、外观保真度和新视角合成上优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 古典绘画包含丰富的空间、文化和历史内容，将其重建为可探索的3D场景对数字保存、沉浸式展览和文化参与具有重要价值。但现有基于自然图像先验的3D重建方法难以处理古典绘画单视角、风格化、弱透视和弱深度线索的挑战。

Method: 提出GeAR，一个两阶段无训练框架：第一阶段（几何接地）将输入绘画转化为具有更一致 shading 和光照线索的几何接地表示，提升3D高斯重建稳定性；第二阶段（外观复原）在空间约束和多视图一致性下恢复符合艺术品原貌的外观，还原绘画纹理和细节。

Result: 构建了包含10,160幅高分辨率古典绘画的HeriArch基准。大量实验和用户研究表明，GeAR在几何合理性、外观保真度和人类偏好上持续优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: GeAR有效解决了从单幅古典绘画重建3D表示的挑战，实现了几何合理性和视觉保真度的平衡，代码和数据集将公开。

Abstract: Classical paintings preserve rich spatial, cultural, and historical content, making their reconstruction as explorable 3D scenes valuable for digital preservation, immersive exhibition, and cultural engagement. Yet, unlike photographs, they often depict scenes in a single-view, stylized manner, with weak perspective, lighting, and depth cues. Existing 3D reconstruction methods are largely built on natural-image priors, making it difficult to recover geometrically plausible and visually faithful 3D representations from such inputs. To address this challenge, we introduce Classical Painting-to-3D (CP3D), a new task that aims to recover a 3D representation from a single classical painting while jointly ensuring geometric plausibility, appearance fidelity to the source artwork, and plausible novel-view synthesis. We further propose GeAR, a training-free two-stage framework for Geometry Grounding and Appearance Restitution. GeAR first converts the input painting into a geometry-grounded representation with more coherent shading and illumination cues, improving the stability of 3D Gaussian reconstruction. It then restores artwork-faithful appearance across views under spatial constraints and multi-view consistency, recovering the painterly textures and details weakened during grounding. In addition, we construct HeriArch, a curated benchmark of 10,160 high-resolution classical artworks for systematic evaluation of CP3D. Extensive experiments and user studies show that GeAR consistently outperforms strong baselines in geometric plausibility, appearance fidelity, and human preference. Code and dataset will be released publicly.

</details>


### [194] [Toward Site-Aware MR Art Exhibitions: A SLAM-Based Deployment Pipeline for Spatial Coherence and Exhibition Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17665)
*Yawei Zhao,Yuming Zhu,Hao Li,Yuqi Liang,Ao Yu,Anca-Simona Horvath,Pan Hui*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向大规模MR艺术展览的实用部署流程，将空间对齐从技术机制拓展为体验设计决策，并通过用户实验验证了对展览连贯性、沉浸感和作品解读的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MR展览系统多局限于原型或特定案例，缺乏大规模实践指导，亟需兼顾技术与体验的系统性部署方案。

Method: 先进行试点实验对比标记法与SLAM空间对齐方法，基于结果开发SLAM驱动的MR展览流程，再通过系统开销与用户反馈进行双重评估。

Result: 空间对齐不仅影响技术稳定性，还显著影响展览连贯性、参观者连续感、沉浸感及艺术作品解读。

Conclusion: 该流程为大规模MR艺术展览部署提供了经验参考，证明了空间对齐是融合技术部署与策展设计的关键因素。

Abstract: Mixed Reality (MR) is increasingly being used in exhibition settings to bring digital artworks into relation with the physical environment. However, existing MR exhibition systems are often confined to prototypes or case-specific deployments, offering limited guidance for large-scale practical implementation. To address this gap, this paper presents a practical pipeline for designing and deploying large-scale MR art exhibitions, treating spatial alignment not only as a technical mechanism but also as an experiential design decision. We first conducted a pilot study comparing marker-based and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM)-based alignment methods in an MR exhibition setting. Based on the results, we developed a SLAM-based pipeline for MR exhibitions that integrates technical deployment with exhibition curation. We then evaluated the pipeline through both system overhead measures and users' experiential feedback. The results show that spatial alignment influences not only technical stability, but also overall exhibition coherence, visitors' sense of continuity and immersion, and artwork interpretation. These findings provide an empirically grounded reference for future large-scale MR art exhibition deployment.

</details>


### [195] [FillGauss: Fine-Grained Filling-Aware Impact Sound Generation for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17773)
*Chen Yang,Ganye Wen,Bin Huang,Jiayi Lyu,Zehai Niu,Linlin Shen,Jinbao Wang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了细粒度填充感知冲击声音生成任务，构建了包含5000多条录音的FillImpact数据集，并提出了集成3D高斯泼溅与内部状态条件的FillGauss生成框架，实现了符合物理规律的高保真冲击声音合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D感知音频生成方法仅建模空心刚体表面几何，忽略了内部填充状态这一关键物理因素，该因素会显著调节声学共振与阻尼特性。

Method: 构建FillImpact多模态数据集（88种物体、5000+录音），提出FillGauss框架：将3D高斯泼溅几何特征、3D空间撞击坐标与细粒度文本物理条件融合到潜在扩散架构中，实现位置感知、撞击器感知和填充感知的音频生成。

Result: 生成的高保真冲击声音符合底层物理原理，在物理接地跨模态音频生成任务上达到了新最优水平。

Conclusion: FillImpact数据集与FillGauss框架有效解决了内部填充状态对声学影响的建模问题，为多模态物理感知音频生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Synthesizing physically plausible impact sounds from visual observations remains a great challenge in multi-modal AI. Existing 3D-aware audio generation methods primarily model the surface geometry of hollow rigid bodies. However, they fundamentally overlook internal filling states, a critical physical factor that drastically modulates acoustic resonance and damping. To address this issue, we have defined a new task called Fine-Grained Filling-Aware Impact Sound Generation. As a foundational step, we first introduce the fine-grained fill-aware dataset (FillImpact), a pioneering multi-modal collection comprising over 5,000 rigorous acoustic recordings from 88 diverse real-world objects. It captures impact interactions with varying internal contents (i.e., water, rice), a continuous range of fill levels, and distinct striker materials. Furthermore, comprehensive acoustic analysis confirms that the collected data closely aligns with established physical laws governing acoustic resonance and damping, indicating its suitability for physically grounded modeling. Building on this dataset, we propose a novel generative framework (FillGauss) that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with internal state conditioning for sound generation. By fusing 3DGS geometric features, precise 3D spatial strike coordinates, and fine-grained textual physical conditions within a latent diffusion architecture, FillGauss enables position-aware, striker-aware, and filling-aware audio generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach could generate high-fidelity impact sounds that adhere to underlying physical principles, establishing a new state-of-the-art for physically grounded cross-modal audio generation.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [196] [Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16195)
*Elena Kopteva,Vitaliy Hlynianyi-Zhuk*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文识别并系统分析了RLHF中一个结构性混杂因素——标注者状态偏移。由于成对偏好标签可能反映标注者在标注时的心理状态（如压力、情绪），而非纯粹的输出质量比较，这种状态依赖的偏差会在奖励建模和策略优化中传播，形成结构化偏误。论文提出了可检验的假设、审计框架及验证计划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF偏好数据通常假设偏好标签仅反映输出质量差异，忽略了标注者状态变化带来的系统性偏差。这种偏差不同于随机噪声或普通分歧，而是状态依赖、可能跨标注者共享，且会通过奖励模型和策略优化层层放大，最终影响模型行为。

Method: 提出了一个理论框架，包括：定义标注者状态偏移、状态混杂、相关状态偏差等概念；定义"生存层面情感真实性"作为可测量的响应模式（涵盖词汇、语用、话语和安全相关特征）；推导出五个可证伪的预测及效应量阈值；设计了审计协议和试点研究计划。

Result: 揭示了标注者状态偏移如何能够通过数据聚合幸存并进入学习到的奖励信号，形成结构化偏误。提供了可操作的审计框架，用于在公开可用的指令微调模型上检测此类偏差。

Conclusion: 标注者状态偏移是RLHF偏好数据中一种合理且可检验的结构化偏误来源。提出的审计框架为未来识别和缓解此类偏差提供了基础，有助于提升RLHF偏好数据的质量和模型对齐的可靠性。

Abstract: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditions, raters' preferences may shift over time. As a result, preference data can encode rater state alongside judgments about response quality. These shifts differ from ordinary disagreement or random label noise. They are state dependent, can be shared across annotators working under similar conditions, and can propagate through reward modeling and policy optimization. We therefore propose rater state shift as a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data. This paper develops a hypothesis and an audit framework for studying this source of bias. We define rater state shift, rater state confound, and correlated rater state bias. We also define survival level emotional authenticity as a measurable response pattern using lexical, pragmatic, discourse, and safety related features. We analyze how correlated rater state bias can survive aggregation and enter learned reward signals. We derive five falsifiable predictions and effect size thresholds for an initial audit. Finally, we present an audit protocol and pilot study plan that can be applied to publicly available instruction tuned models. We do not infer the training history of any specific deployed model. Our goal is to isolate a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data.

</details>


### [197] [Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16196)
*Aleksandrs Vališevskis,Aleksandrs Okss,Inese Tīģere,Aleksejs Kataševs,Dina Bethere,Anete Hofmane,Airisa Šteinberga,Undīne Gavriļenko,Santa Meļķe,Lucie Matoušková*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套开源MATLAB框架，用于开发轻量化深度学习模型进行情感触觉识别。通过468个CNN模型搜索，发现13.2k参数的膨胀一维CNN在软体交互伴侣上实现75%测试准确率和85%留一法交叉验证准确率，并提出启发式阈值+CNN的混合推理策略用于嵌入式部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体传感交互伴侣虽然物理安全且情感直观，但其可变形性和多通道触觉传感使得人类情感的鲁棒解读变得复杂，现有方法难以同时兼顾准确性和嵌入式部署的实时性要求。

Method: 构建了一个包含1326个标注手势序列、覆盖25名儿童/青少年/成年人样本的FAIR合规数据集；系统探索了468个CNN模型的结构与超参数，选用膨胀一维CNN作为核心架构；采用启发式阈值滤波+CNN细粒度分类的混合推理管线。

Result: 13.2k参数模型达到75%测试准确率和85%留一法交叉验证准确率；量化部署每窗口仅需3.2 MMAC，可在目标微控制器上实现20 Hz实时运行；相比启发式系统，CNN能识别微妙的社交触觉，而高力负向互动由阈值逻辑更可靠捕捉。

Conclusion: 具有情感意义且保护隐私的触觉解读在计算上可行，可直接嵌入软体治疗伴侣中；混合推理策略被提出作为嵌入式部署方案，硬件集成将在后续研究中完成。

Abstract: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-source MATLAB-based framework for the development and validation of compact deep learning models for affective touch recognition in soft interactive companions. As a primary contribution, a diverse FAIR-compliant dataset of 1326 labelled gesture sequences collected from 25 participants spanning children, teenagers, and adults is made publicly available, providing a reusable resource for future research in affective touch recognition. Through systematic architecture and hyperparameter exploration across 468 CNN models, the study identifies compact dilated one-dimensional convolutional neural networks (1D CNNs) as the most effective solution, with a 13.2k-parameter model achieving 75% test accuracy and 85% mean leave-one-subject-out cross-validation accuracy. Theoretical inference-time analysis shows that quantized deployment requires 3.2 MMAC per window, compatible with 20 Hz real-time operation on the target microcontroller. PC-based real-time simulation with the physical toy streaming sensor data demonstrates that the CNN resolves subtle social touches that the previous heuristic system failed to detect, whereas high-force negative interactions are captured more reliably by trivial threshold-based logic. The resulting hybrid inference pipeline - instantaneous heuristic filtering followed by CNN-based nuanced gesture classification - is proposed as the embedded deployment strategy. The study demonstrates that emotionally meaningful, privacy-preserving touch interpretation is computationally feasible for direct embedding within soft therapeutic companions, with hardware integration addressed in a forthcoming study.

</details>


### [198] [From Modalities to Propositions: A Language-Centric Framework for Multimodal Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16560)
*Nadine Chang,Maying Shen,Shizhe Diao,Jialiang Wang,Jingde Chen,Thomas Breuel,Pavlo Molchanov,Rafid Mahmood,Jose M. Alvarez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种多模态语言表示方法，将图像、视频、文本等观测数据统一表示为原子命题的集合，通过全局语义码本实现跨模态共享空间，支持可解释推理、跨模态理解和组合式检索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态表示缺乏统一的、可解释的语义空间，不同模态之间难以进行细粒度的对齐、推理和组合式理解。

Method: 将任何模态的观测数据表达为原子命题（关于场景中实体、动作和关系的简单陈述）的集合；构建全局语义码本，将这些原子命题统一到共享的规范词汇空间中，实现从细粒度事实到高层概念的跨模态表示。

Result: 在自动驾驶和开放世界数据上展示了该框架的有效性，支持可解释推理、跨模态理解和检索、组合式多模态理解及复杂结构化检索。

Conclusion: 该统一语言表示框架为多模态数据提供了一个兼具可解释性、推理能力和组合性的通用解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a language representation for multimodal data in which any observation, whether image, video, or text, is expressed as a bag of atomic propositions, simple statements about the entities, actions, and relations in a scene. A global semantic codebook unifies these into a shared vocabulary of canonical atomic propositions, placing every modality and observation into one interpretable space that spans fine grained facts to high level concepts and composes into richer ones. This brings interpretability with reasoning, cross-modal understanding and retrieval, and compositionality that enables complex multimodal understanding, rich data curation and complex structured retrieval. We demonstrate the framework on autonomous driving and open-world data.

</details>


### [199] [Some Large Language Models Exhibit Consistent Risk Attitudes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16197)
*Bowen Sun,Rui Min,Yuxi Wang,Brian Odegaard,Qi Wang,Jing Du*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在不确定性下的风险态度，发现大多数LLMs表现出任务内一致性、跨领域稳定性以及风险态度分布收敛于较窄范围，揭示了风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定且先前未被充分表征的维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高风险开放环境中部署AI系统时，感知风险如何转化为行动这一关键维度尚未被测量。作者旨在探究LLMs是否存在系统性和一致性的风险态度。

Method: 提出一个跨领域框架，将情境风险信念与分类决策解耦。对6个代表性LLM和100名人类参与者进行空间导航、临床分诊和财务分配三项任务测试，使用回归模型提取信念-决策映射，量化风险敏感性和风险态度偏差。

Result: 大多数LLM表现出：(i) 任务内一致性；(ii) 跨领域排序稳定性；(iii) 风险态度分布收敛于较人类更窄的范围。

Conclusion: 风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定且先前未被充分表征的维度，为评估和对齐开放决策中的AI系统奠定了基础，并激励进一步研究这些内在行为倾向的起源。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence systems are deployed in open-ended, high-stakes settings, a critical dimension remains unmeasured: how perceived risk is translated into action. We test whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic and consistent risk attitudes under uncertainty. We introduce a cross-domain framework that decouples contextual risk belief from categorical decision, and apply it to six representative LLMs and 100 human participants across spatial navigation, clinical triage, and financial allocation tasks. Using regression models, we extract each agents belief-to-decision mapping and quantify risk sensitivity and risk attitude bias. We find that most tested LLMs exhibit (i) robust intra-task consistency, indicating stable mappings from contextual belief to risk decision within a fixed task domain; (ii) cross-domain rank-order stability, preserving relative risk posture across tasks; and (iii) a convergence toward a restricted risk-attitude distribution relative to the broader human baseline. These results reveal risk attitude as a stable and previously uncharacterized dimension of LLM behavior, establishing a foundation for evaluating and aligning AI systems in open-ended decision-making and motivating further investigation into the origins of these intrinsic behavioral dispositions.

</details>


### [200] [A Survey on GNN-based Link Prediction: Techniques, Applications, and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16198)
*Chengcheng Sun,Yajie Song,Cheng Zhai,Jiayun Tian,Jia Yang,Xiaobin Rui,Jian Zhang,Zhixiao Wang,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对基于图神经网络（GNN）的链接预测方法进行了全面综述，从技术和应用两个维度提出了新的分类体系，涵盖了GCN、GAE、GAT、GFormer等编码器架构在知识图谱和推荐系统中的应用，并讨论了当前挑战和未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有综述缺乏对GNN底层架构及其在不同图结构中链接预测应用的系统探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出了一种基于技术和应用的新颖分类法：技术维度聚焦GCN、GAE、GAT、GFormer等编码器架构；应用维度聚焦知识图谱和推荐系统中的链接预测用例。

Result: 构建了GNN链接预测的系统性综述框架，分析了各架构的优缺点及实际应用场景。

Conclusion: GNN-based链接预测已在多个领域展现重要价值，但仍面临挑战，未来有广阔的研究空间。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as the leading paradigm for link prediction, enabling the inference of missing connections and the anticipation of potential future links. However, existing reviews lack systematic exploration specifically targeting underlying GNN architectures and diverse graph structures. To address this critical gap, this paper provides a comprehensive review of GNN-based link prediction from a novel and dedicated GNN perspective. We propose an innovative taxonomy that categorizes recent advancements based on techniques and applications. From a technique perspective, we focus on key GNN encoder architectures, including GCN-based, GAE-based, GAT-based, and GFormer-based methods, discussing their strengths and limitations. From an application perspective, we highlight prominent use cases of link prediction in knowledge graphs and recommendation systems, demonstrating their real-world impact. In addition, we examine the current challenges and discuss promising future directions.

</details>


### [201] [PlanFlip: Attacking Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Planning-Phase Prompt Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16199)
*Yuhang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PlanFlip框架，针对多智能体LLM系统的规划阶段设计了四种提示注入攻击，发现强模型反而更脆弱、同质化流水线存在盲点，并提出两种防御策略，核心结论是异构模型多样性是系统安全的前提。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的规划阶段是关键攻击面，单次注入即可级联放大破坏所有子任务，现有研究对此关注不足。

Method: 提出PlanFlip框架，包含四种规划阶段提示注入攻击（目标替换PF-1、优先级反转PF-2、上下文污染PF-3、角色混淆PF-4），伪装成工具输出绕过关键词过滤。在3479个episode上评估9个前沿LLM，并提出两种防御策略：GoalAnchorCheck (D1) 和 CrossAgentConsensus (D2)。

Result: (1) 能力越强越脆弱，GPT-5攻击成功率最高(ASR=0.68)；(2) 同质化流水线存在相关智能体盲点，攻击可重构计划但同骨干Critic报告对齐；(3) 推理增强模型(DeepSeek-R1)完全抵抗注入。防御策略在15/16个单元中优于基线。

Conclusion: 异构模型多样性是多智能体系统安全的前提条件，同质骨干网络的冗余无法提供针对规划阶段攻击的保护。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on a Planner to decompose goals into sub-task sequences that downstream Executor and Critic agents execute and audit. We identify the planning phase as a critical attack surface: a single injection into the Planner's context achieves cascade amplification, corrupting all downstream sub-tasks simultaneously. We introduce PlanFlip, a framework comprising four planning-phase prompt injection attacks -- GoalSubstitution (PF-1), PriorityInversion (PF-2), ContextPollution (PF-3), and RoleConfusion (PF-4) -- each disguised as plausible tool outputs to evade keyword filters. Evaluating nine frontier LLMs across 3,479 episodes, we uncover three findings: (1) capability amplifies vulnerability -- GPT-5 achieves the highest attack success rate (ASR = 0.68), contradicting the assumption that stronger models are inherently more secure; (2) homogeneous pipelines exhibit a correlated-agent blind spot -- GPT-4o and Llama-3.3-70B show ASR near 0 yet Stealth = 1.00 and StepShift > 0, with attacks restructuring plans while the same-backbone Critic reports alignment (two independent judges confirm -0.20 to -0.32 semantic deviation, r = 0.943); (3) reasoning-augmented models resist injections -- DeepSeek-R1 achieves StepShift = 0.00 across all attacks. We propose GoalAnchorCheck (D1) and CrossAgentConsensus (D2), achieving detection rates up to 1.00 and outperforming same-backbone baselines in 15 of 16 cells. Our key insight: heterogeneous model diversity is a security prerequisite for multi-agent systems; redundancy within a homogeneous backbone provides no protection against planning-phase attacks.

</details>


### [202] [Deterministic Replay for AI Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16200)
*Rasheed Mudasiru*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: agrepl 是一个开发优先的 CLI 框架，通过 MITM 代理拦截 Agent 系统的外部交互，实现完全确定性的重放，达到了 1.0 的重放保真度和 98.3% 的每步延迟降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI Agent 系统（LLM + 外部工具/API）本质上是非确定性的——LLM 采样方差、外部 API 状态、CDN 基础设施头部和执行环境噪声共同导致无法忠实地重现之前的 Agent 运行。现有可观测平台能捕获执行日志，但无法在隔离环境中复现一次运行。

Method: agrepl 在传输层通过中间人(MITM)代理拦截所有外部交互，将其序列化为结构化执行轨迹，然后在严格隔离、零出站网络访问的环境中重放。形式化定义了 Agent 执行模型和请求-键匹配函数 K(s)，证明了确定性不变性；引入噪声感知差异算法，将 HTTP 头部差异分类为信号层和噪声层。

Result: 在五个工作负载上的实证评估（n=250 个重放实例）显示：重放保真度 F=1.0，每步延迟中位数降低 98.3%。

Conclusion: agrepl 用 Go 实现，以单一静态二进制文件发布，采用 MIT 许可证，为 AI Agent 系统的可重现调试提供了有效的确定性重放解决方案。

Abstract: AI agent systems that couple large language models (LLMs) with external tools and APIs are inherently non-deterministic: LLM sampling variance, external API state, CDN infrastructure headers, and execution-environment noise collectively prevent any prior agent run from being faithfully re-executed. Existing observability platforms capture execution logs but cannot reproduce a run in isolation. We present agrepl, a developer-first CLI framework for deterministic replay of agent executions. agrepl intercepts all external interactions at the transport layer via a man-in-the-middle (MITM) proxy, serialises them as structured execution traces, and replays them in a strictly isolated environment with zero outbound network access. We formalise the agent execution model, define the request-key matching function K(s), and prove the determinism invariant. We introduce a noise-aware diff algorithm classifying HTTP header divergence into signal and noise tiers. Empirical evaluation across five workloads (n = 250 replay instances) demonstrates replay fidelity F = 1.0 and a median per-step latency reduction of 98.3%. agrepl is implemented in Go, ships as a single static binary, and is released under the MIT licence.
  Keywords: AI agents, deterministic replay, LLM debugging, reproducibility, MITM proxy, execution tracing, record/replay systems.

</details>


### [203] [OrientSAM: Mitigating Camera-Centric Shortcut in Multimodal Spatial Reasoning via Orientation-Aware Spatial Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17657)
*Wenxiao Fan,Hang Yin,Kan Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出OrientSAM框架，通过注入显式朝向信息（朝向感知token和傅里叶角度编码）结合课程学习策略，解决多模态大模型在空间推理中依赖相机中心线索、忽视参考物体视角的问题，实验表明该方法在非相机视角、以人为中心和朝向敏感任务上显著优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型在进行需要视角变换的空间推理时仍存在困难，它们往往依赖相机中心线索而非从参考物体视角进行推理，导致在非相机参考场景中出现系统性错误。

Method: 提出OrientSAM框架，包含三个关键部分：（1）朝向感知token和傅里叶角度编码，用于将显式朝向信息注入多模态表示；（2）课程学习策略，逐步提升视角感知推理能力；（3）空间数据构建管道，从大规模图像生成朝向感知的空间监督数据。

Result: 在Spatial-MM、ViewSpatial和3DSRBench三个基准上，OrientSAM一致优于强基线，尤其在非相机视图、以人为中心和朝向敏感任务上表现突出。

Conclusion: 显式朝向建模对于缓解相机中心捷径行为、实现更鲁棒的异中心空间推理至关重要。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still struggle with spatial reasoning that requires perspective transformation. In particular, they often rely on camera-centric cues rather than reasoning from the reference object's viewpoint, leading to systematic errors in non-camera reference settings. In this paper, we first analyze this failure mode and show that object orientation is a key factor underlying such camera-centric shortcut behavior. To address this issue, we propose OrientSAM, an orientation-aware spatial alignment framework for multimodal models. OrientSAM injects explicit orientation information into multimodal representations through orientation-aware tokens and Fourier-based angle encoding, and further adopts a curriculum learning strategy to progressively improve perspective-aware reasoning. In addition, we build a spatial data construction pipeline to generate orientation-aware spatial supervision from large-scale images. Experiments on Spatial-MM, ViewSpatial, and 3DSRBench show that OrientSAM consistently outperforms strong baselines, especially on non-camera-view, person-centric, and orientation-sensitive tasks. The results further demonstrate that explicit orientation modeling is important for mitigating camera-centric shortcut behavior and enabling more robust allocentric spatial reasoning in multimodal models.

</details>


### [204] [Generative Ontology Induction: Domain-Agnostic Schema Discovery from Document Corpora Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16201)
*Sergei Sergienko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出生成式本体归纳（GOI）框架，能从样本语料中自动导出结构化的本体蓝图（含实体、维度、属性、关系、约束），并以带类型的图（6种节点、7种边）输出为YAML/JSON。在四个对比本体上的验证显示，GOI提示生成的结构骨干覆盖率达95-100%，远优于通用模板（52.2%-97.8%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本体工程是知识密集型AI系统的关键瓶颈，现有自动化方法要么依赖预定义模式、限于狭窄领域，要么产生非结构化输出，无法用于下游流程。

Method: 提出GOI框架：从示例语料中归纳生成蓝图（实体、维度、属性、关系、约束），导出为带类型的图（6种节点类型、7种边类型），以YAML/JSON格式输出。并引入Node Coverage Score作为评价指标，衡量生成输出中结构本体节点（类、属性、维度）的占比。

Result: 在四个不同本体上（软件服务发票、岗位描述、疼痛管理临床访视记录、专业服务合同）验证，GOI提示生成的结构骨干覆盖率达95-100%。对比实验中，通用三字段模板在发票本体上达97.8%，但在其他领域本体上分别降至52.2%、62.2%、78.3%。

Conclusion: GOI框架能跨领域、跨文档类型保持高结构覆盖率，且不依赖于模型对文档类型的熟悉程度，显著优于通用模板方法。

Abstract: Ontology engineering remains a critical bottleneck in knowledge-intensive AI systems. Existing automated approaches either depend on predefined schemas, operate within narrow domains, or produce unstructured outputs unsuitable for downstream pipelines.
  We introduce Generative Ontology Induction (GOI), a domain-agnostic framework that induces a generative blueprint - entities, dimensions, properties, relationships, and constraints - from a corpus of examples and exports it as a typed graph (six node types, seven edge types) in YAML/JSON. We introduce the Node Coverage Score, a novel evaluation metric that measures the fraction of structural ontology nodes (classes, properties, and dimensions) appearing in generated outputs.
  A controlled generative validation on four contrasting ontologies - a familiar Software Services Invoice schema, a custom Job Description Ontology, a confidential Pain-Management Clinical Visit Record Ontology, and a Professional Services Contract & Statement of Work Ontology - shows that GOI-prompted generation covers 95-100% of the structural backbone in every case; a generic three-field template holds at 97.8% on the invoice schema but drops to 52.2% on the Job Description Ontology, 62.2% on the Pain-Management ontology, and 78.3% on the Professional Services Contract ontology. The structural coverage holds regardless of how familiar the document type is to the model.

</details>


### [205] [Democratizing AI with Small Language Models: Structured Benchmarking and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Local Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16202)
*Daniel Cersosimo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨AI民主化的核心问题：在普通机构可承受的硬件和治理约束下，能否选取、审计并专业化小型开源语言模型。通过对9个135M至3B参数的模型在1085道多选题基准上的评估与参数高效微调，发现子3B模型可通过规范化流程成为结构化场景下的可行本地专家。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI民主化不应仅追求前沿规模通用性，而应关注在普通机构可满足的硬件与治理约束下，能否实现模型的选取、审计与专业化。

Method: 构建1085道16主题多选题基准，评估9个135M-3B参数的开源语言模型；采用4位NF4量化结合DoRA/LoRA的共享参数高效微调流程，在NVIDIA L4级别硬件上进行适配。

Result: 基线评估中Qwen Coder 3B准确率最高（75.67%）；微调后Qwen Coder 3B提升+26.85点，SmolLM2 1.7B提升+25.92。子3B模型在结构化专业任务中具备可行能力。

Conclusion: 通过规范的基准构建、跨模型评估与低成本专业化，子3B模型可作为结构化专业场景的本地专家，实现AI民主化的实际落地。

Abstract: AI democratization is not primarily a question of matching frontier-scale generality; it is a question of whether capable models can be selected, audited, and specialized under hardware and governance constraints that ordinary institutions can actually satisfy. This paper studies that problem through a controlled evaluation of nine open-weight language models between 135M and 3B parameters on a 1,085-example, 16-topic multiple-choice benchmark designed for structured local deployment. The benchmark emphasizes symbolic precision, constrained formatting, extraction, and short-horizon semantic decision making under a strict one-letter output protocol. A shared parameter-efficient fine-tuning pipeline then adapts a subset of models using 4-bit NF4 quantization with DoRA/LoRA-style adapters on an NVIDIA L4-class budget. In base evaluation, Qwen Coder 3B leads at 75.67% strict accuracy, followed by Qwen2.5 1.5B at 67.10%, Qwen3.5 2B at 64.98%, and Granite 3.3 2B at 64.61%. On the shared 108-example held-out fine-tuning split, adaptation improves Qwen Coder 3B by +26.85 points, SmolLM2 1.7B by +25.92, Qwen2.5 1.5B by +19.44, SmolLM2 360M by +10.18, and SmolLM2 135M by +5.55. Across ranking, topic-level heterogeneity, difficulty strata, failure composition, efficiency frontiers, and topic-conditioned transfer, the same conclusion recurs: a disciplined workflow of benchmark construction, cross-model evaluation, and low-cost specialization already makes a subset of sub-3B models viable as local experts for structured niche workloads.

</details>


### [206] [SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18116)
*Lopez Jhon,Hinojosa Carlos,Ghanem Bernard*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出符号几何智能体（SGA），通过拦截LLM生成的动画代码、提取符号场景图并检测空间冲突，提升了代码驱动教学动画的几何正确性和视觉清晰度，在MMMC-Code基准测试中实现了最高16.1%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM生成教学动画的框架虽能生成可执行代码，但忽视了几何遮挡等空间正确性问题，导致视觉可读性差。

Method: 提出符号几何智能体（SGA），作为即插即用模块，拦截LLM生成代码，部分执行后提取符号场景图，检测并修正空间冲突；同时引入曼宁视觉质量分数（MVQS）作为免渲染的空间完整性评估指标。

Result: 在MMMC-Code基准上，SGA在4个LLM主干和2个智能体管道中，最高MVQS达73.11（Code2Video+GPT-5.1），相对原始基线提升16.1%，且在8种配置中的7种上实现MVQS提升。

Conclusion: SGA作为即插即用模块能有效提升LLM生成动画代码的空间正确性，且MVQS可作为可靠的无渲染评估代理。

Abstract: Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions. We propose the Symbolic Geometric Agent (SGA), a plug-and-play module for code-centric animation pipelines that intercepts LLM-generated code, performs partial execution to extract symbolic scene graphs, and applies targeted refinement when spatial conflicts are detected. We further introduce the Manim Visual Quality Score (MVQS), a deterministic rendering-free proxy for spatial integrity. Experiments on the MMMC-Code benchmark across four LLM backbones and two agentic pipelines show that SGA achieves a peak MVQS of 73.11 (Code2Video + GPT-5.1), corresponding to a 16.1% relative improvement over the raw baseline, and improves MVQS in 7 of 8 backbone x pipeline configurations.

</details>


### [207] [Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16204)
*Darshan Deshpande*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）的文本世界建模方法，通过双向锚点感知去噪解决自回归世界模型的左到右偏差问题，在九个开源环境、十二个模型家族上构建239,403条轨迹，证明MDLM在连贯性、接地性和 rollout 多样性上优于4倍参数量的LLM，并在三个OOD环境上实现最高47%的绝对性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习需要多样化的训练环境，但手工环境随模型性能提升而失效，稀疏奖励导致模式坍塌。世界模型可规模化生成多样性，但自回归世界模型存在左到右偏差，无法对全局依赖的状态锚点（如工具模式、前序轮次、预期结果）进行条件控制。

Method: (i) 将文本世界建模形式化为可操控的转移动力学问题，分解为初始状态、任务上下文、工具模式、领域规则和操控指令；(ii) 构建包含239,403条轨迹的数据集；(iii) 对比自回归LM与掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM），MDLM通过双向锚点感知去噪提升性能；(iv) 提出即插即用的GRPO训练框架并引入确定性状态检查；(v) 在三个OOD环境上对1.2B-7B的三种代理骨干进行零样本迁移消融实验。

Result: MDLM在连贯性、接地性和rollout多样性上优于4倍参数量的LLM，推理延迟相当。在ScienceWorld、ALFWorld、AppWorld三个OOD环境上，基于LFM2.5、Qwen3、Mistral三种1.2B-7B代理骨干，实现最高47%绝对性能提升，无需环境特定微调。

Conclusion: 掩码扩散语言模型凭借双向锚点感知机制，能够更有效地建模文本世界中的全局依赖关系，在零样本跨环境迁移任务中表现出显著优势，为RL训练环境多样化提供了可行方案，全部工作已开源。

Abstract: Recent growth in reinforcement learning (RL) has surfaced a need for diverse, specialized training environments. Hand-curated environments with fixed task and reward difficulties become ineffective signals as model performance improves, and sparse rewards over long horizons induce mode collapse on specific workflows or tool structures. World models that simulate environment states have matched pure rollout performance, making them promising for scaling diversity on-demand. However, autoregressive (AR) world models suffer from a left-to-right bias preventing conditioning on globally interdependent state anchors such as tool schemas, prior turns, and expected outcomes. We (i) formalize text-based world modeling as a steerable transition-dynamics problem decomposed into initial state, task context, tool schemas, domain rules, and steering directives, and (ii) curate 239,403 grounded state-action trajectories spanning nine open-source environments and twelve frontier model families. We compare AR LMs and masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), showing MDLMs, via bidirectional anchor-aware denoising, achieve better coherence, groundedness, and empirically validated rollout diversity than LLMs over 4x their parameter size, at comparable inference latency. We introduce a plug-and-play GRPO training framework with deterministic state checks, and perform zero-shot transfer ablations on three OOD environments (ScienceWorld, ALFWorld, AppWorld) across three 1.2B-7B agent backbones (LFM2.5, Qwen3, Mistral), achieving up to 47% absolute gains over baselines without environment-specific fine-tuning. We further conduct behavioral analysis of failure modes under adversarial scenarios and human evaluation on realism, outcome correctness, and training utility. We open-source our work to encourage research in this direction.

</details>


### [208] [It Takes 8 Tokens: Weak-to-Strong Off-Policy RL via Auxiliary Branches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16205)
*Dayu Wang,Jiaye Yang,Weikang Li,Jiahui Liang,Liwei Qian,Xin Pei,Jizhou Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出W2SPO方法，利用弱辅助模型注入短片段（最短8个token）引导目标模型探索，解决强化学习中推理样本语义冗余导致策略更新困难的问题。在4B规模模型上，数学推理Pass@1从62.3%提升至64.2%，训练加速3.55倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习在挑战性推理任务中，目标模型生成的样本存在语义冗余，收敛到相同的错误“推理盆地”，导致奖励对比度不足，难以有效更新策略。

Method: 提出W2SPO，一种弱到强的离策略强化学习方法。利用计算效率更高的弱辅助模型向目标模型中间轨迹注入短片段（最短8个token），目标模型从这些偏离状态继续完成推理路径，策略更新仅基于最终可验证奖励限制在短插入片段上。

Result: 在4B规模模型上，数学推理基准测试中优于所有后训练基线。同采样预算下，相比原始GRPO，Pass@1从62.3%提升到64.2%，训练速度提升3.55倍。

Conclusion: 弱辅助分支通过扩展局部探索支持，可以有效诱导更强的目标推理策略，克服支持受限瓶颈。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has emerged as a standard approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models, which typically optimizes the policy by contrasting multiple self generated rollouts. However, we identify a critical support limited bottleneck in this paradigm: on challenging reasoning tasks, the target model's samples often exhibit semantic redundancy, converging into the same erroneous "reasoning basins" that offer negligible reward contrast for policy updates. In this paper, we propose to overcome this limitation through a weak to strong learning paradigm, where a policy's exploration is informed by a weaker but computationally efficient auxiliary model. We introduce W2SPO, an off policy RL method that injects short auxiliary segments often as brief as 8 tokens into intermediate target model trajectories and the target model then completes the reasoning path from these diverted states. Policy updates are restricted to these short inserted segments based on final verifiable rewards. Empirically, W2SPO achieves superior performance among evaluated 4B scale models on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, outperforming evaluated post trained baselines. Compared with vanilla GRPO under the same sampling budget, W2SPO improves Pass@1 from 62.3% to 64.2% while achieving a 3.55 times training speedup. These results suggest that weak auxiliary branches can induce stronger target reasoning policies by expanding local exploration support.

</details>


### [209] [PPO-HSC: An Exploratory Reinforcement Learning Framework Based on Wide-Area Policy Coverage Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16206)
*Yujie Shen,Haowen Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PPO-HSC框架，通过在标准RLVR中引入高阶采样覆盖（HSC）奖励机制，鼓励发现"低相似度高有效性"的推理模式，有效解决LLM微调中的模式崩溃问题，在数学推理和代码生成任务上提升了解决方案多样性与状态空间覆盖率，同时保持或超越了现有RL基线的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准RLVR虽然能有效强化高奖励轨迹，但会导致模型过度优化已知解决方案，牺牲探索能力，陷入"模式崩溃"（Invisible Shackles），无法探索更广泛的解空间。

Method: PPO-HSC框架包含：(1) 高阶采样覆盖（HSC）奖励，激励发现低相似度但高有效性的推理模式；(2) 动态轨迹库，存储已验证的唯一解；(3) 可微分的语义新颖性奖励信号；(4) 合理性约束，确保结构完整性。

Result: 在数学推理（GSM8K、SVAMP）和代码生成任务上，PPO-HSC显著提升了解决方案多样性和状态空间覆盖率，同时保持或超越现有最先进RL基线的准确率和语法完整性。

Conclusion: PPO-HSC通过引入新颖性奖励机制，在不牺牲性能的前提下有效缓解了LLM微调中的模式崩溃问题，为探索性强化学习在语言模型中的应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper introduces PPO-HSC (Proximal Policy Optimization with High-order Sampling Coverage), an exploratory reinforcement learning framework designed to address the "Invisible Shackles" of mode collapse in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning. While standard Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) effectively reinforces high-reward trajectories, it often leads models to over-optimize known solutions, sacrificing curiosity and the ability to explore broader solution manifolds. To overcome this, PPO-HSC incorporates a High-order Sampling Coverage (HSC) reward that incentivizes the discovery of "low-similarity yet high-validity" reasoning patterns. By maintaining a dynamic trajectory library of verified unique solutions, the framework provides a differentiable signal that rewards semantic novelty while ensuring structural rationality through a plausibility constraint. Empirical evaluations on mathematical reasoning (GSM8K, SVAMP) and code generation tasks demonstrate that PPO-HSC significantly enhances solution diversity and state-space coverage while maintaining or surpassing the accuracy and syntax integrity of state-of-the-art RL baselines.

</details>


### [210] [JUMP: Single-Pass Membership Inference on Fine-Tuned Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16207)
*Yeachan Jun,Albert No*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出JUMP方法，利用离散扩散语言模型（dLLMs）的任意顺序解码和并行解码特性，通过联合掩码探针实现高效的单次成员推理攻击，在六个数据集上ROC-AUC从0.82提升至0.90。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对dLLMs的成员推理攻击SAMA采用损失模拟策略，但仅将任意顺序接口作为随机化工具，需要多次查询目标模型和参考模型，效率低下且性能有限。

Method: JUMP方法利用dLLMs的任意顺序解码性选择低参考置信度的位置，再利用并行解码性通过一次联合掩码查询对所有选定位置评分，计算裁剪后的目标/参考重建差距统计量。

Result: 在微调后的LLaDA-8B-Base模型上，覆盖六个MIMIR领域，JUMP将平均ROC-AUC从0.82提升至0.90，显著改善了低FPR（假阳性率）下的检测性能。

Conclusion: JUMP充分利用了dLLMs的独特属性，仅需一次选择传递和一次评分传递即可实现更高效、更准确的成员推理攻击。

Abstract: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) test whether a candidate example appeared in a model's training data. We study MIAs for fine-tuned discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), where membership means inclusion in the target model's fine-tuning set. Unlike autoregressive language models, dLLMs allow an attacker to choose arbitrary mask sets and obtain token distributions for all masked positions in parallel. The prior dLLM attack, SAMA, follows a natural loss-mimicking strategy by averaging reconstruction signals over many randomly sampled masks, but it uses the any-order interface only as randomization and requires many target/reference queries. We propose JUMP (Joint Uncertainty-Guided Mask Probing), a single-pass scoring attack that exploits both distinctive properties of dLLMs: any-order decodability is used to select low-reference-confidence positions, and parallel decodability is used to score all selected positions through one joint masked query per model. JUMP masks the selected positions jointly and computes a clipped target/reference reconstruction-gap statistic. On fine-tuned LLaDA-8B-Base across six MIMIR domains, JUMP improves mean ROC-AUC from 0.82 to 0.90 over SAMA and substantially improves low-FPR detection, while requiring only one selector pass and one scoring pass through each of the target and reference models.

</details>


### [211] [ColGraphRAG: Late-Interaction Evidence Retrieval for Multimodal GraphRAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16208)
*Seonok Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出在基于图的 multimodal QA 中，用 ColBERT/ColPali 系列的后期交互（MaxSim）多向量评分替换原有的单向量双编码器相似度，用于图链接图像的候选排序。实验显示该方法提升了图像检索和下游 QA 准确率，尤其在视觉证据重要的问题上效果显著，但文本主导问题表现不一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图链接图像使用单向量双编码器相似度会丢弃 patch 级和 token 级结构信息，导致细粒度对齐不足，影响端到端准确性。

Method: 保持离线图构建、文本和表格检索、结构化提取和下游推理不变，仅将图链接图像节点的候选排序算子替换为 MaxSim 风格的多向量评分（来自 ColBERT/ColPali 系列）。

Result: 在 MultimodalQA 上，图链接图像的检索阶段点估计提升，下游 QA 准确率提高；视觉证据重要的问题上提升更大，文本主导问题上趋势混合。

Conclusion: 后期交互多向量评分可有效改善图链接视觉证据的包含与利用，但更广泛的验证和更细粒度的图级诊断仍是未来工作方向。

Abstract: Graph-grounded multimodal question answering organizes text, tables, and images in a structured evidence graph, yet end-to-end accuracy depends on which multimodal assets are ranked highly enough to enter downstream reasoning; for graph-linked images, single-vector bi-encoder similarity can discard patch- and token-level structure needed for fine-grained alignment. We evaluate replacing the visual candidate-ranking operator over graph-linked image nodes with late-interaction MaxSim-style multi-vector scoring in the ColBERT/ColPali lineage, while keeping offline graph construction, text- and table-side retrieval, structured extraction, and downstream reasoning unchanged. On MultimodalQA, this change is associated with improved retrieval-stage point estimates for graph-linked image candidates and downstream QA gains, with larger movement where visual evidence matters most and mixed trends on text-dominant questions; we interpret the pattern as mechanism-level evidence for graph-linked visual evidence inclusion, while broader validation and finer graph-level diagnostics remain important future work.

</details>


### [212] [Shapley Context Pruning: A Cooperative Game Perspective for Context Reranking and Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16209)
*Yanqiao Chen,Dongsheng Hou,Yuhan Rui,Zhen Cao,Yepang Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Shapley Context Pruning (SCP)框架，从合作博弈论角度对RAG系统中的上下文进行重要性归因和重排序，使用Deep Sets架构和蒙特卡洛采样实现高效剪枝。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统的上下文重排序和剪枝缺乏可解释的统一框架，先前工作多依赖启发式损失函数和经验归因。

Method: 将上下文建模为合作博弈，采用Deep Sets架构近似排列不变的价值函数，基于预训练语言模型进行句子级嵌入，通过成对边际排序损失优化，利用蒙特卡洛采样实现高效训练和推理。

Result: 在支持句召回、NIAH评估、长上下文问答和多跳推理等任务上取得竞争性表现，并提供理论误差界和样本复杂度保证。

Conclusion: SCP框架为RAG上下文重排序提供了兼具理论严谨性和实践可扩展性的新范式。

Abstract: Context reranking and pruning have become essential for improving the efficiency of modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, yet an interpretable and unified framework remains underexplored. Previous work has primarily emphasized lexical retrieval, cross-encoder architectures, model distillation, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), mostly relying on heuristic loss functions and empirical attribution. This paper presents Shapley Context Pruning (SCP), a novel framework for context reranking that establishes a cooperative-game-theory perspective for importance attribution by modeling the context as a cooperative game. Balancing the trade-off between fine-grained and coarse-grained representations, we employ a Deep Sets architecture to approximate a permutation-invariant value function at the sentence level, utilizing pre-trained language models as sentence embedders and optimizing via a pairwise margin ranking loss. To ensure practical scalability without sacrificing mathematical rigor, we leverage Monte-Carlo sampling for efficient training and inference, providing formal theoretical error bounds and sample complexity guarantees for preserving Top-K subset rankings. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive experiments-spanning supporting-sentence recall, Needle-in-the-Haystack (NIAH) evaluations, long-context QA, and multi-hop reasoning-alongside rigorous ablation studies on embedding quality and attribution strategies. The model achieves competitive downstream QA performance against robust baselines.

</details>


### [213] [A Survey on the Verification of Reinforcement Learning Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16210)
*Luca Marzari,Ezio Bartocci,Enrico Marchesini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 这篇综述论文对强化学习策略验证方法进行了统一分类，从验证范式、时间范围和保证强度三个维度梳理了现有工作，并提供了理论基础、假设限制和未来方向的系统性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着强化学习在安全关键领域的广泛应用，基于神经网络的策略缺乏严格的行为保证成为部署的主要障碍，而相关研究快速增长但概念分散，亟需系统性的梳理和统一视角。

Method: 提出了一种三维分类法：(1)验证范式（形式化vs概率性），(2)时间范围（单步vs多步），(3)保证强度。同时统一了理论基础，明确了隐含假设和局限性。

Result: 建立了一个统一的RL验证方法分类体系，理清了不同方法之间的关系，识别了新兴研究方向。

Conclusion: 该综述为RL策略验证领域提供了系统性的视角和分类框架，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展和实际部署。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is increasingly applied in complex, safety-critical domains, yet the lack of rigorous behavioral guarantees for neural network-based policies remains a major barrier to deployment. Recent advances in policy expressiveness and scale have intensified this challenge, leading to a rapidly growing but conceptually fragmented body of work on RL policy verification. This survey provides a unifying perspective on RL verification methods. We introduce a taxonomy that clarifies relationships among existing approaches along three axes: verification paradigm (formal versus probabilistic), temporal scope (step-wise versus multi-step), and guarantees strength. Beyond taxonomy, we unify underlying theoretical foundations, make implicit assumptions and limitations explicit, and identify emerging directions.

</details>


### [214] [Accurate and Efficient Long-Term Memory for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16211)
*Zicheng Zhao,Xinyang Guo,Luyao Lv,Menghan Wang,Ming Li,Shuaicheng Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MOSAIC是一种结构化、冲突感知的长时记忆框架，通过实体图存储、哈希加速检索和主动冲突检测，在长对话QA和冲突检测任务上显著优于现有基线，同时保持低延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理的持久记忆系统存在两个问题：扁平无结构存储丢失了关系上下文，导致无法进行多跳和时间推理；依赖昂贵的LLM分类器不适用于低延迟场景，且缺乏信息验证机制导致矛盾累积。

Method: MOSAIC提出三个关键技术：(1)实体类型图存储，保留事件、人物和关系的关系结构；(2)哈希加速双路径检索，用局部敏感哈希替代LLM分类实现快速查找；(3)保存时主动冲突检测，通过交叉引用新信息与图邻居触发矛盾条目的更新或删除。

Result: 在LoCoMo上达到89.35%准确率（+27.21 pp）；HaluMem-Medium和Long的提取F1分别为86.77%和85.84%，QA正确率分别为73.10%和70.75%；检测66%注入的事实冲突（是基线的4.7倍）；平均搜索延迟0.58秒/问题。

Conclusion: MOSAIC通过结构化存储和冲突检测机制，在保持高准确率的同时实现了高效检索，有效解决了现有记忆系统的关系上下文丢失和矛盾累积问题。

Abstract: LLM agents augmented with persistent memory can recall past interactions, but existing systems suffer from two limitations: flat, unstructured storage loses relational context needed for multi-hop and temporal reasoning, and reliance on expensive LLM-based classification makes them impractical for latency-sensitive deployment. Without mechanisms to validate new information against stored knowledge, these systems silently accumulate contradictions. We present MOSAIC (Memory-Organized Structured Agent for Information Collection), a structured, conflict-aware long-term memory framework for LLM agents that is substantially more accurate and efficient. MOSAIC introduces three key capabilities: (1) entity-typed graph storage with semantic classification preserving relational structure across events, personas, and relationships, enabling multi-hop and temporal reasoning over conversation history; (2) hash-accelerated dual-path retrieval replacing LLM-based classification with locality-sensitive hashing, achieving near-instantaneous lookup with negligible accuracy loss; and (3) active conflict detection at save time that cross-references new information against existing graph neighbors, triggering updates or deletions for contradictory entries. Evaluated on LoCoMo (long-conversation QA), HaluMem, and a novel clinical-guideline error compounding test, MOSAIC achieves 89.35% accuracy on LoCoMo (+27.21 pp over the best baseline), best HaluMem-Medium extraction F1(86.77%) and HaluMem-Long extraction F1 (85.84%), best QA correctness on both Medium and Long (73.10%, 70.75%), and detects 66% of injected factual conflicts-4.7 times higher than the best baseline (14%)-while hash-accelerated retrieval keeps average search latency at 0.58 s per question.

</details>


### [215] [Symbolic Augmentation Closes a Canonical-Equivalence Blind Spot in Neural Fact-Checkers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16212)
*Genpei Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对科学文本中数量单位错误的类型化验证方法，构建了五类错误分类体系和1500条基准数据集，并发现现有模型在物理等价量（如95°C与368.15K）的鲁棒性上存在严重缺陷。通过提出符号增强训练框架，将模型对此类等价变换的准确率从36.5%提升至98.2%，同时保持甚至略微提升分布内性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在总结科学文本时经常出现数字和单位的幻觉，这种错误可能悄无声息地颠倒科学论断，而现有方法对此缺乏有效的检测手段。

Method: 将数量错误检测重新定义为类型化验证任务，提出五类数量错误分类体系；构建1500条标注基准（来自PMC和arXiv）；使用ModernBERT微调作为基础模型；提出符号增强（Symbolic Augmentation）训练框架，通过反向运行符号验证器的模块生成保持标签的增强训练数据。

Result: 微调ModernBERT达到macro-F1=0.899，远超现成神经事实检测器；但发现在规范等价改写（如95°C→368.15K）上准确率骤降至36.5%；符号增强将鲁棒性提升至98.2%，macro-F1略升至0.902；增强编码器在零推理成本下匹配封闭前沿LLM，并迁移至外部基准（SciFact-Open上macro-F1从0.791提升至0.828）。

Conclusion: 训练时增强是符号组件与学习组件之间正确的集成点；符号特征作为辅助编码器输入没有效果，符号银标签在教师噪声下呈负扩展。

Abstract: Large language models hallucinate numbers and units when summarizing scientific text, a failure mode that can silently invert a scientific claim. We recast the detection of such errors as typed verification: we introduce a five-class typed-quantity error taxonomy and a 1500-item benchmark, rewritten from PMC and arXiv sources and labeled by two independent LLM annotators with adjudication (Krippendorff's alpha = 0.882). A ModernBERT encoder fine-tuned on this benchmark reaches macro-F1 = 0.899, far above any off-the-shelf neural fact-checker, yet four probes expose a sharp structural blind spot: on canonical-equivalent rewrites of physically equivalent quantities (e.g., 95°C and 368.15 K) its accuracy collapses to 36.5%. We propose Symbolic Augmentation, a training-time framework that runs the modules of a symbolic verifier in reverse to generate label-preserving augmented training data. The augmentation lifts canonical-equivalence robustness to 98.2% while slightly improving in-distribution accuracy (macro-F1: 0.899 to 0.902); the augmented encoder matches a closed-frontier LLM at no inference cost and transfers to an external benchmark (SciFact-Open binary macro-F1: 0.791 to 0.828). Two negative results sharpen the claim: symbolic features as auxiliary encoder inputs add nothing, and symbolic silver labels scale negatively under teacher noise. Together these results identify training-time augmentation as the right integration point between symbolic and learned components.

</details>


### [216] [SelKV: Selective KV Cache Merging with Per-Token Merge-or-Drop and Attention Compensation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16213)
*Soumia Bouyahiaoui,Manel Kara laouar,Aicha Boutorh,Mohamed Hadj Ameur*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的双组件KV缓存压缩框架，通过软余弦门控自适应合并令牌和注意力比补偿机制修正softmax不平衡，在只保留25% KV缓存的情况下，在LongBench上取得优异性能，并在长文本解码中实现3.3倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM自回归生成依赖KV缓存，其内存消耗随上下文长度线性增长，成为主要瓶颈。现有基于令牌合并的压缩方法存在两个问题：1) 采用无差别聚合导致表征退化；2) 产生"注意力下垂"问题，即合并后的令牌与单个令牌获得相同的softmax权重，造成表示不匹配。

Method: 提出无需训练的双组件框架：1) 软余弦门控——基于值向量相似性自适应调控合并决策，抑制或丢弃不相似令牌以保持语义保真度；2) 注意力比补偿机制——利用预填充阶段注意力统计生成解码时的logit偏置，纠正因合并导致的softmax不平衡。

Result: 在LongBench的16个英文数据集上，仅保留25% KV缓存即可达到强压缩性能；在分组查询注意力(GQA)模型上表现尤其鲁棒，近乎无损；在复杂多文档QA任务上甚至超越全缓存基线；在100k令牌长度下实现3.3倍解码加速。

Conclusion: 该框架有效解决了现有令牌合并方法中的无差别聚合和注意力下垂问题，实现了高效且高质量的KV缓存压缩，尤其在长文本场景下具有显著的速度优势。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate text autoregressively, relying on a key-value (KV) cache whose memory footprint grows linearly with context length, creating a major bottleneck. Recent compression methods mitigate this cost via token merging; however, these approaches often rely on indiscriminate aggregation, which degrades representations and introduces attention sag, a mismatch where merged tokens receive the same softmax mass as individual tokens despite encoding multiple inputs. We propose a training-free, dual-component framework for KV cache compression that addresses these limitations. First, a soft cosine gate adaptively modulates merging decisions based on value-vector similarity, suppressing or discarding dissimilar tokens to preserve semantic fidelity. Second, we introduce an attention-ratio compensation mechanism that applies a decoding-time logit bias derived from prefill attention statistics, correcting the softmax imbalance induced by merging. Evaluated on LongBench (16 English datasets) while retaining only 25% of the KV cache, our framework achieves strong compressed performance against representative one-shot baselines. It is especially robust on the evaluated grouped-query attention (GQA) models, maintaining nearlossless generation quality. Furthermore, the method outperforms the full-cache baseline on complex multi-document QA tasks and delivers a 3.3x decoding speedup at 100k tokens.

</details>


### [217] [RAIL Guard: Closing the Evaluation-to-Remediation Gap in Responsible AI for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16215)
*Sumit Verma,Pritam Prasun,Pritish Kumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RAIL Guard是一个闭环责任AI管道，通过评估-重写-再评估的迭代机制修复LLM输出的问题，在8个可测量维度上实现了96.9%的收敛率，同时识别出可修复维度与结构性维度的关键区别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM护栏系统仅作为二元分类器阻断不安全内容，失败后只能丢弃输出从头重试，效率低下，缺乏迭代修复机制。

Method: 构建闭环责任AI管道RAIL Guard，包含评估-重写-再评估的迭代循环；在8个可测量维度上对4个前沿LLM、4,276个内容输出及6,400个工具调用场景进行实验评估。

Result: 闭环修复收敛率96.9%（对比阻断重试的49.1%）；反馈驱动的自我修复在可修复维度上达86.6%收敛且无显著效用损失；预工具调用评估减少33%不安全执行且不影响任务完成；发现透明性、问责制、包容性等结构性维度需架构方案而非算法修复。

Conclusion: 闭环修复显著优于传统阻断重试方法，但需区分可修复维度与结构性维度，后者需要架构层面的解决方案。

Abstract: Existing guardrail systems for large language model agents operate as binary classifiers that block unsafe content, leaving organizations to discard failing outputs and retry from scratch. We introduce RAIL Guard, a closed-loop responsible AI pipeline that evaluates LLM outputs across eight measurable dimensions and iteratively remediates failing outputs through an evaluate-rewrite-reevaluate loop. We evaluate the pipeline across three experiments on four frontier LLMs and 4,276 content outputs plus 6,400 agent tool-call scenarios. Closed-loop remediation achieves 96.9% convergence versus 49.1% for block-and-retry, though the highest-convergence method reduces utility by 22.3%; feedback-driven self-repair achieves 86.6% convergence on fixable dimensions with no significant utility loss (p = 0.177). Pre-tool-call evaluation reduces unsafe agent executions by 33% (p = 0.007) with zero impact on task completion. We identify a key distinction between fixable dimensions that respond to remediation and structural dimensions (Transparency at 93.0%, Accountability at 92.8%, and Inclusivity at 82.5% failure) that require architectural rather than algorithmic solutions. The system is available as open-source SDKs.

</details>


### [218] [Generalist AI Control: Towards Multi-purpose Adaptive Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16313)
*Klinsmann Agyei,Pouria Sarhadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于学习的通用控制器（Generalist Controller），通过注意力机制和动态状态空间表示，单一神经网络即可控制不同阶数和动态特性的多种系统，性能接近传统LQI控制器，并能泛化到未见过的工况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
